title: deliciously jammy ethiopian millet gomen beet tibs
description: a sweet and savory brunch dish featuring jammy beet tibs over a bed of creamy millet gomen. shojin-friendly and perfect for a lazy sunday morning.
instructions: heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
add the diced beets and cook for 5 minutes, until they start to caramelize.
add the berbere spice, curry powder, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
add the millet and stir to combine with the beet mixture.
cook for another 5 minutes, until the millet is lightly toasted and the beet mixture is jammy.
fluff the millet with a fork and stir in the chopped cilantro.
serve the millet and beet tibs over a bed of creamy gomen.
garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
